channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Will Texas' new top voting official be a 'disruptor'? Locals are preparing for it
item.description: Just ahead of closely contested midterms, Texas is about to get a new top voting official. Many locals there fear the frontrunner is a state lawmaker ...

item.title: Postal Service says its cash crisis is delayed until at least 2031, but problems loom
item.description: The U.S. Postal Service is no longer set to be out of cash in 2027, the agency's head says. But its finances remain shaky as Trump officials keep putt...

item.title: Meta plans to release AI-powered prediction market app, documents show
item.description: The company is building an app separate from Facebook and Instagram where people can wager on the outcome of real-world events, using "play money."

item.title: Understanding 'masculinism,' a movement to restore the primacy of men
item.description: Masculinism is a belief that feminism emasculates men, and men should be in control while women stay at home raising children. The Atlantic writer Hel...
